creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
One of the master sites' distfiles doesn't match the md5 checksum, so
I added the new checksum to md5.  It was verified that nothing had changed
by a diff -ruN between the original and the new, so it should be fine.
Found by: Satoshi's package building scripts.

Fix: 

-Chris--TFQ9iogSFzYs6iUqZGwnaxVLB4Zu3ccAG1dYff6xlFN4dWIG
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

Index: aterm/files/md5
===================================================================

retrieving revision 1.2
diff -u -r1.2 md5
--- md5	1999/03/08 20:59:22	1.2
+++ md5	1999/04/29 19:58:19
@@ -1 +1,2 @@
 MD5 (aterm-0.3.4.tar.gz) = 555ca711affe9e06010701230d5a6759
+MD5 (aterm-0.3.4.tar.gz) = a481a97822bcc1a1dfe04b8867b7653e
